variants: Aris Kyriakou is an accomplished professional who holds a Jinxmaker Registration, which certifies his expertise in the mystical arts. He graduated from Runestone College, where he honed his skills and knowledge in various esoteric subjects. In addition to his professional pursuits, Aris serves as the Archivist of Rosewell Community Heritage, contributing to the preservation of local history. He often incorporates Yoruba proverbs into his work, enriching his storytelling and discussions. Furthermore, he has published articles in the esteemed Ravenstripe Manuscripts, showcasing his insights and discoveries.
